title: Some thoughts on the election: It's (still) the Economy, Stupid
section_path: Some thoughts on the election: It's (still) the Economy, Stupid
section_path_text: Some thoughts on the election: It's (still) the Economy, Stupid
summary:
Main
The three things investors need to know before the US elections:
It may not be as consequential as many believe. The outcome may be delayed and even if we get a clear winner, both Presidential candidates have been sketchy on the policy details. And, however norm-breaking, President's don't govern alone.
